overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long NET Daily ETF (NETG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed, aiming to provide daily 2x leveraged exposure to the price performance of Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) stock, less fees, and expenses NETG was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
